title: Squeaky Plush Christmas Dinner on Rope Dog Toy – 50cm Red Rope with 3 Festive Plush Characters Pig in Blanket, Pudding & Carrot – Internal Squeakers – Interactive Chew, Tug Of War & Fetch
features: This festive rope dog toy features three fun Christmas dinner plush characters — a pig in blanket, a pudding, and a carrot — securely attached to a strong red rope.
Each plush character includes an internal squeaker, producing engaging sounds that encourage dogs to chew, tug, chase, and stay active during festive playtime.
Made from soft yet durable polyester, the plush toys are gentle on your dog’s mouth while the sturdy rope adds strength and interactive possibilities for tug games.
The rope measures approximately 50cm × 1.5cm with plush characters around 10cm each, making it ideal for puppies, small, and medium dogs that enjoy playful rope toys.
Lightweight at just 110g, this Christmas dog toy is easy to carry and cuddle, providing hours of festive fun and stimulation to keep your dog happy and entertained.
description: Product Description Festive Fun for Four-Legged Friends Keep tails wagging this Christmas with our collection of squeaky plush and rope dog toys. Designed for endless festive play, each toy combines soft textures and durable rope for chewing, tugging, and cuddling — bringing joy and excitement to every playful pup. Mix, Match & Make Playtime Festive Squeaky Plush and Rope Toys for Every Pup Bring variety and excitement to your dog’s festive fun with this playful collection of plush, squeaky, and rope toys. Choose from cheerful characters and designs — from crackers to baubles — all crafted for tugging, chewing, and cuddling joy throughout the holidays. Festive Fun That Keeps Tails Wagging All Aboard the Santa Paws Express! Delight your dog this Christmas with the Santa Paws Train on Rope toy! Featuring squeaky plush carriages on a durable rope, it’s perfect for tugging, fetching, and cuddling. Soft yet strong, this festive toy keeps tails wagging and playtime full of holiday cheer. A Festive Feast of Fun for Your Furry Friend Treat your pup to a Christmas feast they can play with! This squeaky plush rope toy features a pig in a blanket, carrot, and pudding design for hours of tugging, chewing, and fetching fun. Soft, durable, and delightfully festive — perfect for playful pets this holiday season. Crackling Christmas Fun for Playful Pups Let your dog join the festive fun with this squeaky plush cracker toy! Featuring a soft exterior, crinkle sound, and durable rope for tugging and chewing, it’s perfect for keeping your pet active and happy. Available in red or green for a cheerful Christmas touch. A Christmas Treat Your Pup Will Gobble Up Meet Trevor the Turkey — the perfect festive companion for playful pups! This soft, squeaky plush toy with sturdy rope legs is ideal for tugging, chewing, or cuddling. Fun, festive, and durable, it’s sure to keep tails wagging all Christmas long.
